BR002.name: Bihar Diesel Anudan Yojana
BR002.description: Provides subsidy support for diesel used in irrigation for farmers during low rainfall/drought situations.
BR002.eligibility: Resident of Bihar; farmer must have cultivable land; applicable for irrigation using diesel pump sets; other conditions as per state notification.
BR002.ministry: Department of Agriculture, Government of Bihar
BR002.benefits: Diesel subsidy for irrigation expenses (amount varies based on rules and season).

OD001.name: KALIA Scheme (Krushak Assistance for Livelihood and Income Augmentation)
OD001.description: Provides financial assistance to small/marginal farmers and landless agricultural households for livelihood support.
OD001.eligibility: Resident of Odisha; small/marginal farmers or landless agricultural households; must meet state eligibility rules.
OD001.ministry: Department of Agriculture & Farmers' Empowerment, Odisha
OD001.benefits: Direct financial support for farming inputs and livelihood needs (as per scheme norms).

RJ002.name: Rajasthan Mukhyamantri Kisan Mitra Urja Yojana
RJ002.description: Supports farmers with electricity-related benefits to reduce power burden for agricultural connections.
RJ002.eligibility: Resident of Rajasthan; farmers with agricultural electricity connections; must fulfill state guidelines.
RJ002.benefits: Subsidy/relief on agricultural electricity charges (as per scheme rules).

KA001.name: Vidyasiri Food and Accommodation Scheme
KA001.description: Provides free food and accommodation support to eligible students studying in Karnataka to reduce financial burden.
KA001.eligibility: Resident of Karnataka; students belonging to eligible categories; studying in recognized institutions; income criteria applicable.
KA001.benefits: Support for hostel accommodation and food expenses (as per scheme norms).

WB001.name: Aikyashree Scholarship
WB001.description: Provides scholarships to minority students to continue school and higher education with financial support.
WB001.eligibility: Resident of West Bengal; minority student; studying in recognized institution; income criteria applicable.
WB001.ministry: West Bengal Minority Development and Finance Corporation (WBMDFC)
WB001.benefits: Scholarship support for tuition and academic expenses based on course level.

DL001.name: Delhi Ladli Scheme
DL001.description: Supports the education and long-term financial security of girl children in Delhi by providing staged financial benefits.
DL001.eligibility: Resident of Delhi; girl child born in Delhi; must be enrolled in school; income criteria may apply as per government rules.
DL001.ministry: Department of Women and Child Development, Delhi
DL001.benefits: Financial assistance deposited in the name of the girl child at different education stages.

AS001.name: Atal Amrit Abhiyaan
AS001.description: Provides cashless treatment for critical diseases for eligible families in Assam through empanelled hospitals.
AS001.eligibility: Resident of Assam; eligible family as per scheme guidelines; must meet inclusion/exclusion rules.
AS001.ministry: National Health Mission / Government of Assam
AS001.benefits: Cashless treatment for critical illnesses as per approved list and scheme limits.

AP001.name: Dr. YSR Aarogyasri / NTR Vaidya Seva
AP001.description: Provides cashless medical treatment for major diseases and surgeries for eligible families in Andhra Pradesh.
AP001.eligibility: Resident of Andhra Pradesh; eligible families based on state criteria (often through ration/health card).
AP001.ministry: Health Medical & Family Welfare Department, Andhra Pradesh
AP001.benefits: Cashless hospitalization and treatment in government and empanelled private hospitals.

HP001.name: HIMCARE Scheme (Himachal Health Scheme)
HP001.description: Provides health insurance coverage to eligible families not covered under other health schemes in Himachal Pradesh.
HP001.eligibility: Resident of Himachal Pradesh; families as per category criteria defined in scheme guidelines.
HP001.ministry: Department of Health & Family Welfare, Himachal Pradesh
HP001.benefits: Health coverage for hospitalization and treatments up to scheme limit.

GG001.name: Mukhyamantri Apprenticeship Scheme
GG001.description: Supports youth through apprenticeship training opportunities and stipend assistance to improve employability.
GG001.eligibility: Resident of Gujarat; youth meeting education and apprenticeship eligibility; must be registered as per scheme process.
GG001.ministry: Labour, Skill Development and Employment Department, Gujarat
GG001.benefits: Apprenticeship opportunity with stipend support (as per scheme norms).

MH001.name: MahaSwayam Employment & Skill Portal
MH001.description: Provides online access for job seekers to find employment, skill training, and career opportunities in Maharashtra.
MH001.eligibility: Resident of Maharashtra; job seekers and students can register; eligibility depends on specific training/job listings.
MH001.ministry: Skill Development, Employment and Entrepreneurship Department, Maharashtra
MH001.benefits: Access to job listings, career counselling, and skill development programs via one portal.

KK001.name: Additional Skill Acquisition Programme (ASAP Kerala)
KK001.description: Provides industry-relevant skill training to students and young job seekers to boost employability and career growth.
KK001.eligibility: Resident of Kerala; students/youth meeting course eligibility; admission based on ASAP guidelines.
KK001.benefits: Skill training, certification, and placement support through ASAP programs.

GG002.name: Griha Aadhar Scheme
GG002.description: Provides monthly financial assistance to eligible homemakers to support household expenses and welfare.
GG002.eligibility: Resident of Goa; married women/homemakers meeting state eligibility criteria; income criteria may apply.
GG002.ministry: Department of Women and Child Development, Goa
GG002.benefits: Monthly financial assistance to homemakers (amount as per Goa government norms).

GG003.name: Gujarat Rural Housing Assistance (Top-up Support)
GG003.description: Provides additional support for rural housing beneficiaries to complete construction and basic needs in Gujarat.
GG003.eligibility: Resident of Gujarat; rural housing beneficiary; must be listed/approved under eligible housing program criteria.
GG003.benefits: Additional support/top-up assistance for eligible rural housing beneficiaries (as per norms).

WB002.name: Banglar Bari (Rural Housing Scheme)
WB002.description: Provides financial support for building rural houses for families who are not covered under central housing programs.
WB002.eligibility: Resident of West Bengal; rural household; must meet state selection and housing eligibility criteria.
WB002.ministry: Panchayats & Rural Development Department, West Bengal
WB002.benefits: Financial assistance for house construction in rural areas (as per scheme rules).

TN003.name: Amma Canteen Scheme
TN003.description: Provides highly subsidized food to urban poor at Amma Canteens across Tamil Nadu.
TN003.eligibility: Resident of Tamil Nadu; open to all, especially urban poor.
TN003.ministry: Municipal Administration & Water Supply Department, Tamil Nadu
TN003.benefits: Low-cost meals including breakfast, lunch, and dinner.

UP001.name: Mukhyamantri Kanya Sumangala Yojana
UP001.description: Provides financial assistance for the education and welfare of girl children.
UP001.eligibility: Resident of Uttar Pradesh; girl child; income criteria applicable.
UP001.ministry: Department of Women Welfare, Uttar Pradesh
UP001.benefits: Financial support at various stages of education.

MP001.name: Ladli Laxmi Yojana
MP001.description: Ensures education and financial security for girl children.
MP001.eligibility: Resident of Madhya Pradesh; girl child; family must meet criteria.
MP001.ministry: Women and Child Development Department, Madhya Pradesh
MP001.benefits: Savings certificates and scholarships for education.

PB001.name: Old Age Pension Scheme Punjab
PB001.description: Provides monthly pension to senior citizens for financial support.
PB001.eligibility: Resident of Punjab; senior citizens meeting income criteria.

TS003.name: Rythu Bandhu Scheme
TS003.description: Provides investment support to farmers for agricultural activities.
TS003.benefits: Direct cash support per acre per season.

JH001.name: Sarvjan Pension Scheme
JH001.description: Provides pension support to elderly, widows, and disabled persons.
JH001.eligibility: Resident of Jharkhand; eligible category beneficiaries.

HR001.name: CHIRAYU Haryana
HR001.description: Provides free medical treatment to families under Ayushman Bharat top-up.
HR001.eligibility: Resident of Haryana; eligible family income below limit.
HR001.benefits: Cashless treatment up to enhanced coverage.

CG001.name: Rajiv Gandhi Nyay Yojana
CG001.description: Provides income support to farmers, laborers, and vulnerable groups.
CG001.eligibility: Resident of Chhattisgarh; registered farmer or laborer.

OD002.name: Mo Sarkar Initiative
OD002.description: Improves public service delivery through citizen feedback.
OD002.eligibility: Resident of Odisha; users of government services.

TN004.name: Tamil Nadu Free Laptop Scheme
TN004.description: Provides free laptops to students studying in government and aided institutions.
TN004.eligibility: Resident of Tamil Nadu; student of eligible course and institution.
TN004.ministry: Department of Information Technology, Tamil Nadu

KK004.name: Karunya Benevolent Fund
KK004.description: Provides financial assistance for treatment of critical illnesses.
KK004.eligibility: Resident of Kerala; economically weaker section patients.
KK004.ministry: Department of Health & Family Welfare, Kerala
KK004.benefits: Financial aid for surgery and treatment.

RJ003.name: Rajasthan Free Medicine Scheme
RJ003.description: Provides free essential medicines at government hospitals.
RJ003.eligibility: Resident of Rajasthan; patient visiting government hospitals.
RJ003.benefits: Free medicines for common and chronic diseases.

AP002.name: Amma Vodi Scheme
AP002.description: Provides financial assistance to mothers for sending children to school.
AP002.eligibility: Resident of Andhra Pradesh; mother of school-going child.
AP002.benefits: Annual financial assistance for education expenses.

KA002.name: Bhagyalakshmi Scheme
KA002.description: Promotes girl child education and welfare through financial incentives.
KA002.eligibility: Resident of Karnataka; girl child from BPL family.
KA002.ministry: Women and Child Development Department, Karnataka

UK001.name: Gaura Devi Kanya Dhan Yojana
UK001.description: Encourages education of girl children through savings incentives.
UK001.ministry: Women Empowerment and Child Development Department, Uttarakhand
UK001.benefits: Savings amount released after completion of education.

ML001.name: Meghalaya Health Insurance Scheme (MHIS / MegCARE)
ML001.description: Provides universal health insurance coverage to residents of Meghalaya.

SK001.name: Old Age Allowance Scheme Sikkim
SK001.description: Provides financial assistance to elderly citizens.

TR001.name: Prani Mitra Scheme
TR001.description: Supports farmers and animal husbandry activities.
TR001.eligibility: Resident of Tripura; farmer or livestock owner.

BR003.name: Startup Bihar Seed Fund Scheme
BR003.description: Supports startups with seed funding and incubation.

DL002.name: Delhi Disability Pension Scheme
DL002.description: Provides financial assistance to persons with disabilities.
DL002.eligibility: Resident of Delhi with certified disability.

KK003.name: Kerala Destitute Relief Pension
KK003.description: Provides financial assistance to destitute individuals.
KK003.eligibility: Resident of Kerala; economically weaker category.

AS002.name: Assam Divyang Empowerment Scheme
AS002.description: Supports welfare and empowerment of differently-abled persons.

UP002.name: UP Women Free Bus Travel Scheme
UP002.description: Provides free bus travel for women passengers.
UP002.eligibility: Women residents travelling via state buses.

GG004.name: Goa Tourism Homestay Promotion Scheme
GG004.description: Supports homestay development for tourism growth.

TS004.name: Telangana Minority Scholarship (Pre & Post Matric)
TS004.description: Provides financial assistance to minority students in Telangana pursuing school and higher education.
TS004.eligibility: Resident of Telangana belonging to Muslim, Christian, Sikh, Buddhist, Jain or Parsi community with family income within prescribed limits.
TS004.benefits: Tuition fee reimbursement, maintenance allowance and academic support.

IN001.name: National Scholarship Portal - Post Matric Scholarship
IN001.description: Centralized scholarship platform providing financial assistance to eligible students across India.
IN001.eligibility: Students pursuing post-matric studies in recognized institutions with income within prescribed limits.
IN001.ministry: Ministry of Education, Government of India
IN001.benefits: Tuition fee coverage and maintenance allowance.

TS005.name: ePASS Telangana Post Matric Scholarship
TS005.description: Provides fee reimbursement and maintenance allowance to SC, ST, BC, EBC and Minority students pursuing higher education.
TS005.eligibility: Resident of Telangana belonging to eligible category studying in recognized institutions.
TS005.benefits: Full or partial tuition fee reimbursement and maintenance charges.

TS006.name: Mana Ooru Mana Badi Programme
TS006.description: Infrastructure development and modernization of government schools in Telangana.
TS006.benefits: Improved school infrastructure, digital classrooms and better facilities.

AP003.name: Jagananna Vasathi Deevena
AP003.description: Provides financial assistance for hostel and mess charges to students pursuing higher education.
AP003.eligibility: Students from eligible categories studying in recognized institutions in Andhra Pradesh.
AP003.benefits: Financial support for accommodation and food expenses credited directly to the mother's bank account.

MH003.name: Maharashtra Overseas Education Scholarship
MH003.description: Financial assistance for Maharashtra students pursuing higher studies abroad.
MH003.eligibility: Students belonging to eligible categories admitted to recognized foreign universities.
MH003.benefits: Financial assistance up to ₹20 lakhs for overseas education.

DL003.name: Delhi Merit Scholarship Scheme
DL003.description: Scholarship for meritorious students studying in government and government-aided schools in Delhi.
DL003.eligibility: Students studying in recognized schools in Delhi securing prescribed minimum marks.
DL003.benefits: Annual financial assistance based on merit performance.

KA004.name: Arogya Karnataka Scheme
KA004.description: Provides universal health coverage and cashless treatment to residents of Karnataka in empanelled hospitals.
KA004.eligibility: Permanent residents of Karnataka with valid identification.
KA004.ministry: Department of Health & Family Welfare, Karnataka
KA004.benefits: Cashless treatment for secondary and tertiary healthcare services.
